title: ci: redundant make vendor in test_skopeo job
body:
## Problem

The `test_skopeo` GHA job runs `make vendor` before building and testing. That job depends on `validate`, which already runs `make vendor` + `hack/tree_status.sh`.

## Review context

Sandbox GHA migration review (mtrmac, [PR #1 discussion](https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/1#discussion_r3182590794)), marked "not now":

> `make vendor` in the `test_skopeo` task is redundant (and `go mod verify` is fairly costly): that task depends on `validate` which already checked this

## Related

- Epic #2919
- `test_skopeo` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
